name: Rich Cheddar Sauce for Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cubed cheddar cheese in the top of a double boiler.
2. Set over simmering water and stir gently until the cheese begins to melt.
3. Gradually add milk while stirring constantly.
4. Continue stirring continuously until the cheese is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
5. Serve hot over warm apple pie.
